Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know before joining the battle.

Yes, completely free. Download and play with no upfront cost. Optional in-game purchases are available but never required to enjoy the full experience.
Windows 7 or higher, Intel Core i3 / 4GB RAM / 2GB disk space. Most modern PCs run it perfectly.
The installer is lightweight — under 2 minutes on a standard connection. The game updates automatically in the background.
Absolutely. Infinity Kingdom has global servers with players from 150+ countries. Form alliances across borders and conquer together.
Not at all. The tutorial guides you through everything step by step. Beginners and veterans both find it rewarding from day one.
